div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Belgium (Wilson)
div.p: 51. Because of Labor Day holiday, it has been decided to extend the time for written statements from September 16 to September 27 and for opening of hearings from October 2 to October 9. These changes in dates were announced August 22.

We therefore expect to be able to make definitive offers of concessions about October 1.6. Meanwhile, we are preparing a reply to the Belgian counter-proposal of general provisions of April 11, 1939, with a text adapted for inclusion in a new trade agreement. This will be mailed in a few days. We also will prepare as soon as possible a tentative list of requests for concessions by Belgium, which will be subject to revision about October 16.
